title: Disable CentOS7 VM testing
body:
Due to packaging levels of container-selinux, we have a systemic failure in
the podman integration tests.  We have decided to disable this test until
the next version of CentOS is released.

Signed-off-by: baude <bbaude@redhat.com>

@umohnani8 @TomSweeneyRedHat Could one of you drop a /lgtm on this to test the bot?
SELinux disable tests are known failures... Let's see if the bot merges once travis goes green
